# Douglas Mitchell

> Software Architect, Google AI Professional, and Author crafting digital experiences at the intersection of technology and human potential.

## About

Douglas Mitchell is a software architect and full-stack developer specializing in React, Next.js, TypeScript, Python, and cloud technologies. He is Google AI certified with comprehensive training in AI fundamentals, app building, content creation, data analysis, and research methodologies. Douglas is also the author of "The Confident Mind: A Practical Guide to Authentic Confidence," a book that provides actionable strategies for building genuine, lasting confidence.

As a photographer, Douglas specializes in architecture and light photography, exploring the interplay between built environments and natural illumination. His portfolio includes curated collections of architectural photography, workspace photography, and creative project documentation.

## Technical Expertise

**Frontend Development:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vue.js
**Backend Development:** Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, GraphQL, REST APIs
**Cloud & DevOps:** AWS, Docker, CI/CD, Git, Vercel
**AI & Emerging:** Google AI, LLM Integration, System Design, Web3

## Credentials

- Google AI Professional Certificate
- AI Fundamentals Certification
- AI for App Building Certification
- AI for Content Creation Certification
- AI for Data Analysis Certification
- AI for Research and Insights Certification
- AI for Writing and Communication Certification
- AI for Brainstorming and Planning Certification

## Services

**Software Architecture:** Custom web application development, system design, API architecture
**AI Integration:** LLM implementation, intelligent automation, AI-powered workflows
**Photography:** Commercial photography licensing, architectural photography
**Consulting:** Technology strategy, AI adoption, digital transformation

## Published Work

**The Confident Mind:** A Practical Guide to Authentic Confidence
Available on Amazon. The book offers research-backed strategies for building genuine confidence through practical exercises and real-world applications.
